title: voandzeia subterranea
intro: Voandzeia subterranea, also known as African yam or elephant yam, is a type of root vegetable native to tropical Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Voandzeia subterranea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Voandzeia subterranea are often made into decoctions, infusions, or powders, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections.
